tasks.name: Save a top-rated family-friendly restaurant under $20 per person for Friday 7 PM within 3 miles
tasks.description: Find a family-friendly restaurant within 3 miles, rated 4.5+ stars, with an average price under $20 per person and availability on the upcoming Friday at 7:00 PM, then save it to a favorites list called 'Family Dinner Friday'.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Restaurants & Food" category in the main navigation menu.
In the location filter on the left sidebar, type "12345" into the ZIP code field and set the distance radius selector to "Within 3 miles".
Open the "Price" filter section and select the option labeled "Under $20 per person".
Open the "Rating" filter section and check the box for "4.5 stars & up".
Open the "Amenities/Features" or "More filters" section and check the boxes for both "Family-friendly" and "Takes reservations".
Click on the date/time availability filter, choose the next upcoming Friday from the calendar, and set the time slider or dropdown to 7:00 PM.
Open the sort dropdown above the results list and select "Rating: High to Low".
From the sorted results, click on the first restaurant name, then on the restaurant details page click the "Save" or "Add to list" button and choose or create a list named "Family Dinner Friday".

tasks.name: Add the cheaper of two top-rated 24/7 plumbers under $100 call-out to an emergency list
tasks.description: Find two plumbers offering 24/7 emergency service within 10 miles, each rated at least 4.0 stars and charging a call-out fee under $100. Compare their call-out fees and add the cheaper one to a list named 'Emergency Contacts'.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Home Services" or "Trades" category in the main navigation.
In the subcategory list, click on "Plumbers" to open the plumbers directory.
In the location filter, enter "12345" as the ZIP code and set the distance to "Within 10 miles".
Open the "Service availability" filter and check the box labeled "24/7 emergency" or "Emergency calls".
Open the "Rating" filter and select "4.0 stars & up".
Open the "Call-out fee" or "Price" filter and set the maximum call-out fee field to "100" dollars.
Scroll through the results and click on the first two plumbers that show a visible call-out fee in their listing to open each in a new tab or detail view.
Compare the call-out fees shown on the two plumber detail pages and identify the one with the lower fee (while still under $100).
On the detail page of the plumber with the lower call-out fee, click the "Save" or "Add to list" button and select or create a list named "Emergency Contacts".

tasks.name: Plan a weekend by saving two free Saturday afternoon events within 5 miles
tasks.description: Find two different free events happening next Saturday between 1:00 PM and 6:00 PM within 5 miles of ZIP code 12345, and add both events to an events list called 'Weekend Plan'.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the "Events" section in the main navigation.
In the location search bar, type "12345" as the ZIP code and set the distance filter to "Within 5 miles".
Use the date picker or calendar to select the next upcoming Saturday as the event date.
Open the "Time of day" or schedule filter and set the time range to start at 1:00 PM and end at 6:00 PM.
Open the "Price" filter and check the box labeled "Free" or set the maximum price field to "0".
Open the sort dropdown above the event results and select "Soonest first" or "Date & Time" so Saturday events appear in chronological order.
From the filtered results list, click on the first two distinct event titles that match the chosen Saturday date to open each event details page in turn.
On each of the two event detail pages, click the "Save", "Add to list", or "Add to itinerary" button and assign the event to a list named "Weekend Plan".

tasks.name: Contact an environmental volunteering opportunity with at least 10 open spots via the site form
tasks.description: Find a local environmental volunteering event within 15 miles happening within the next month that has at least 10 spots remaining, and send a message using the website's internal contact form expressing interest in joining.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Volunteering" or "Community Service" category in the main navigation.
In the location filter area, enter "12345" as the ZIP code and set the radius slider to "Within 15 miles".
Use the date range filter to set the start date to today and the end date to one month from today.
Open the "Cause" or "Category" filter and check the option for "Environment", "Environmental cleanup", or similar.
Open the "Spots available" or "Capacity" filter and select the option for "10+ spots left" or set the minimum spots field to "10".
Scroll through the filtered results and click on the first volunteering opportunity that is labeled as environmental and shows at least 10 spots remaining to open its detail page.
On the volunteering opportunity detail page, click the "Contact organizer", "Send message", or similar button to open the internal message form.

In the message form, type a short message such as "Hello, I am interested in joining this event. Please let me know if any preparation is needed." in the message text area, fill in any required name field with "Test User", and click the "Send" or "Submit" button.

tasks.name: Bookmark a nearby park with both a playground and dog-friendly area within 3 miles
tasks.description: Find a park within 3 miles of ZIP code 12345 that has both a playground and a dog-friendly area, and add it to a favorites list called 'Local Parks'.
steps: On the homepage, click on the "Parks & Outdoors" category in the main navigation.
In the location search box, enter "12345" as the ZIP code and adjust the distance filter to "Within 3 miles".
Open the "Amenities" filter section and check the box for "Playground".
In the same or another amenities section, check the box for "Dog-friendly" or "Dog park".
Open the sort dropdown above the park listings and choose "Distance: Nearest first".
Review the first few park listings and click on the first park name that shows both "Playground" and "Dog-friendly" in its summary badges or description to open its detail page.
On the park detail page, click the "Save", "Favorite", or bookmark icon to save the park.
When prompted to select a list, choose an existing list named "Local Parks" or create a new list with the name "Local Parks" and assign the park to it.

tasks.name: Join a beginner yoga community group that meets on weekday evenings and RSVP to the next session
tasks.description: Search for a beginner-friendly yoga group that meets on weekday evenings (Monday–Friday after 5 PM) within 10 miles, join the group on the site, and RSVP to its next scheduled meetup.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Groups & Clubs" or "Meetups" section in the main navigation.
In the search bar within the groups section, type "beginner yoga" and press Enter to run the search.
In the location filter, enter "12345" as the ZIP code and set the distance field to "Within 10 miles".
Open the "Experience level" or "Difficulty" filter and select "Beginner" or "All levels".
Open the "Meeting time" or "Schedule" filter and choose "Weekday evenings" or manually select Monday through Friday and set the time range start to "5:00 PM".
From the filtered results, click on the first group whose title or description includes "yoga" and indicates beginner-friendly sessions to open the group detail page.
On the group detail page, click the "Join group" or "Become a member" button to join the group using the site's built-in membership system.

After joining, find the list of upcoming events for the group, click on the next scheduled session listed, and on that event detail page click the "RSVP", "Attend", or "Going" button to confirm attendance.

tasks.name: Shortlist a childcare provider for weekdays under $15/hour with 4.0+ rating within 8 miles
tasks.description: Find a childcare provider available on weekdays from 8 AM to 5 PM within 8 miles of ZIP code 12345, with an hourly rate under $15 and a rating of at least 4.0 stars, then add that provider to a shortlist named 'Childcare Options'.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the "Childcare" or "Family Services" category in the main navigation.
In the location input, type "12345" as the ZIP code and adjust the distance filter to "Within 8 miles".
Open the "Availability" filter and select the option indicating "Weekdays" or manually check Monday through Friday, then set the time range from "8:00 AM" to "5:00 PM".
Open the "Price" or "Hourly rate" filter and set the maximum hourly rate field to "15" dollars.
Open the "Rating" filter section and select the option for "4.0 stars & up".
Open the sort dropdown above the provider list and choose "Rating: High to Low" or "Best match".
From the filtered list, click on the first provider whose listing shows an hourly rate at or below $15 and a rating of at least 4.0 stars to open the provider detail page.
On the provider detail page, click the "Save", "Add to shortlist", or similar button and select or create a list named "Childcare Options" to add the provider.

tasks.name: Build a 'Home Services' list with electrician, gardener, and cleaner all rated 4.0+ within 10 miles
tasks.description: Create or update a custom list called 'Home Services' that includes three different providers: one electrician, one gardener, and one cleaner, each with at least a 4.0-star rating and located within 10 miles of ZIP code 12345.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Home Services" category in the main navigation.
In the location filter, enter "12345" as the ZIP code and set the distance to "Within 10 miles".
Open the "Rating" filter section and select "4.0 stars & up" to apply it for all home services.

In the subcategory list or filter, click on "Electrician" to view only electricians that match the filters, then click on the first electrician with a visible rating of 4.0 stars or higher to open their detail page.
On the electrician detail page, click the "Save" or "Add to list" button and create or select a list named "Home Services" to add this electrician.

Navigate back to the home services category or use the category filter to switch to "Gardener" or "Landscaping", then click on the first gardener with a rating of at least 4.0 stars to open their detail page.
On the gardener detail page, click the "Save" or "Add to list" button and select the existing "Home Services" list to add this gardener.

Return again to the home services category or change the subcategory filter to "Cleaner" or "House cleaning", then click on the first cleaner with a rating of 4.0 stars or higher to open their detail page.
On the cleaner detail page, click the "Save" or "Add to list" button and add this cleaner to the same "Home Services" list, ensuring the list now contains all three provider types.
